text.title: compaction-preserve-refs Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for compaction-preserve-refs as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Compacting via "summarize the conversation in 200 words" with no schema.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model invents the schema each call; references survive only by accident.

failure-mode.description: Letting the LLM add ad-hoc keys ("notes", "thoughts", "todo") that drift between calls.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Schema drift means orchestrators can't validate; downstream tooling that expects 'errors_open' breaks when the model writes 'open_errors' instead.
